title: narcissus serotinus subsp. deficiens
intro: Narcissus serotinus subsp. deficiens, also known as autumn-flowering daffodil, is a subspecies of the narcissus serotinus plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against infections. Narcissus serotinus subsp. deficiens can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tinctures, infusions, and ointments, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
